name: Theertha & Nikhil
text: As first-time homebuyers, working with Pooja was an incredible experience. She patiently walked us through every do and don't of the process, making sure we felt confident at every step. When we decided to move forward with only the second home we saw, she didn't hesitate to double-check that we weren't rushing into anything — proof that she truly puts her clients' best interests above everything else. And thanks to her exceptional negotiation skills, we ended up securing an amazing deal. We couldn't recommend her more highly!
